# Sessile Fauna  

\newpage

## Ascidia  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 2:8){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Bryozoa
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 10:22){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Cnidaria
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in c(23:43)){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Macroalgae
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 79:80){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Porifera
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 93:111){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Unidentified classifications
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in c(70:74,81:85)){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
